title: Postmortem Generator
problem: Post-incident reports are delayed and inconsistent because responders must reconstruct timelines manually from chats, alerts, and ticket updates after high-stress events.
solution: The generator compiles incident artifacts into a structured postmortem draft with timeline, impact analysis, root causes, contributing factors, and follow-up actions for review.

impact.notes: Expected to reduce postmortem draft time from 3 hours to under 45 minutes per incident.
